originalTitle: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour
title: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour
content: Leo XIV wants the world's attention on a continent vital to the Church's future, an aide says.

originalTitle: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
title: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
content: The team was returning from a fixture when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles", officials say.

originalTitle: Nigeria Air Force orders investigation after dozens killed in airstrike
title: Nigeria Air Force orders investigation after dozens killed in airstrike
content: The Nigerian Air Force said it has launched investigations after it struck a village market while targeting militants.

originalTitle: Who is Peter Magyar, Hungary’s new leader who trounced Viktor Orban?
title: Who is Peter Magyar, Hungary’s new leader who trounced Viktor Orban?
content: Magyar's centre-right Tisza Party has won a two-thirds majority in Hungary's parliamentary elections.

originalTitle: Iran’s army says US plan to blockade Hormuz ‘amounts to piracy’
title: Iran’s army says US plan to blockade Hormuz ‘amounts to piracy’
content: The US restrictions on maritime navigation and transit in international waters are illegal, Iranian military says.

originalTitle: Israeli forces fire tear gas near Palestinian schoolchildren
title: Israeli forces fire tear gas near Palestinian schoolchildren
content: Israeli forces fired tear gas towards a group of children trying to walk to school in the occupied West Bank.

originalTitle: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
content: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

originalTitle: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
content: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.

originalTitle: Pope says he has 'no fear' of Trump after scathing criticism
title: Pope says he has 'no fear' of Trump after scathing criticism
content: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".

originalTitle: Man City have psychological edge over Arsenal - Rooney
title: Man City have psychological edge over Arsenal - Rooney
content: Wayne Rooney says Manchester City have the psychological edge over leaders Arsenal in the Premier League title race.

title: Weir on World Cup dreams, coaching kids in Fife & Empire Biscuits
content: Real Madrid star Caroline Weir on the pull of home, working with the next generation in Fife and Scotland's bid to reach the 2027 World Cup.

originalTitle: Sunderland condemn racist abuse of Brobbey
title: Sunderland condemn racist abuse of Brobbey
content: Sunderland say racist abuse of forward Brian Brobbey on social media highlights the "ongoing and unacceptable frequency of this behaviour".
